blueprint_coaster_outamax_bike_and_sidec.source: A multi-launch experience that puts the pedal to the metal with your guests in the driving seat.
blueprint_coaster_outamax_bike_and_sidec.translation: Ziyaretçilerini sürücü koltuğuna oturtan, gaza kadar basan çok fırlatmalı bir deneyim.

blueprint_coaster_outamax_lsm_raid_coast.source: If upside-down wasn't enough, get ready to swing back and forth on this world-class layout that your guests will never forget.
blueprint_coaster_outamax_lsm_raid_coast.translation: Baş aşağı yetmediyse, ziyaretçilerinin asla unutmayacağı bu dünya standartlarındaki düzende ileri geri sallanmaya hazır ol.

blueprint_coaster_vector_child_coaster_0.source: All aboard this child-friendly course of twists and turns that's sure to put the wind in your guests' sails.
blueprint_coaster_vector_child_coaster_0.translation: Ziyaretçilerini rüzgara bırakan, çocuk dostu virajlar ve dönüşlerle dolu bu parkura tüm aileyi bekliyoruz.

blueprint_coaster_vector_child_coaster_r.source: Don't be afraid to retrace your steps on this dual-direction layout.
blueprint_coaster_vector_child_coaster_r.translation: Bu çift yönlü düzende geri dönmekten çekinme.

coaster_cc_childcoaster_desc.source: A fan-favourite coaster that's fun for guests of all ages!
coaster_cc_childcoaster_desc.translation: Her yaştan ziyaretçinin hayran kaldığı eğlenceli bir hız treni!

coaster_cc_childcoasterreturn_desc.source: A fan-favourite, all-ages coaster that's fun in both directions!
coaster_cc_childcoasterreturn_desc.translation: Her iki yönde de eğlenen, her yaşa hitap eden favori hız treni!

coaster_cc_raidcoaster_desc.source: A dynamic coaster offering switch tracks, and dual-direction launch pieces to propel your guests this way and that!
coaster_cc_raidcoaster_desc.translation: Makas rayları ve ziyaretçileri bir o yana bir bu yana fırlatan çift yönlü fırlatma parçaları sunan dinamik bir hız treni!

coaster_cc_steellaunched_desc.source: A launched steel coaster with motorcycle and sidecar styled trains.
coaster_cc_steellaunched_desc.translation: Motosiklet ve yan sepetli stilde trenleri olan fırlatmalı çelik hız treni.

fr_flyingtheatre_desc.source: Glide through another world on this immersive cinema experience.
fr_flyingtheatre_desc.translation: Sürükleyici sinema deneyiminde başka bir dünyada süzül.

fr_galeforce_desc.source: Crank up the fun with a ride on this swinging pendulum!
fr_galeforce_desc.translation: Sallanan sarkaca binerek eğlenceyi zirveye taşı!

shopitem_guesthat_sorcery_desc.source: A stylish, pointed hat that's probably not the source of unfathomable magical power.
shopitem_guesthat_sorcery_desc.translation: Sivri uçlu şık bir şapka; muhtemelen anlaşılmaz büyülü güçlerin kaynağı değil.
